metadata.name: shipment-optimizer
metadata.summary: Optimize shipment assignments in logistics projects.

classes.name: shipment_optimizer.optimizer.ShipmentOptimizer

methods.name: shipment_optimizer.optimizer.ShipmentOptimizer.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the optimizer with available shipments, drivers, and vehicles.
\:param shipments: List of shipments
\:param drivers: List of drivers
\:param vehicles: List of vehicles

methods.name: shipment_optimizer.optimizer.ShipmentOptimizer.prioritize_shipments
documentation:
Prioritize shipments based on deadlines and priority levels.
Sorts shipments in place by delivery deadline.

methods.name: shipment_optimizer.optimizer.ShipmentOptimizer.assign
documentation:
Assign shipments to available drivers and vehicles.
Returns a dictionary of assignments.
A class to optimize shipment assignments to drivers and vehicles.
